title: hydrangea hortensia var. otaksa
intro: Hydrangea hortensia var. otaksa, also known as Bigleaf Hydrangea or Otaksa Hydrangea, is a perennial flowering plant native to Japan, characterized by its large, blue-violet flowers. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which contain compounds like phenolic acids and glycosides that have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hydrangea hortensia var. otaksa include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures that can be used to treat various health conditions, such as gastrointestinal issues and respiratory problems.
